requirement_topic.en: Authorized Local Importer / TRA Bahrain Agent Registration and Labelling Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 授权本地进口商/巴林TRA代理商注册及标签要求
requirement_topic.zht: 授權本地進口商/巴林TRA代理商註冊及標籤要求

summary.en: Only authorized importers or distributors registered with TRA Bahrain may import and sell type-approved wireless and telecom terminal equipment in Bahrain. The TRA Bahrain approval mark and approval number must appear visibly on the device label and on the product packaging. A local Bahrain-based importer or TRA-registered agent must be appointed by the overseas manufacturer as the responsible party for the type approval application and ongoing compliance obligations. Bahrain serves as an important logistics and distribution gateway to Saudi Arabia via the King Fahd Causeway; however, goods transited onward to Saudi Arabia require separate CITC/SDAIA type approval for Saudi domestic sale, and TRA Bahrain approval does not confer Saudi market access. Unauthorized importation or sale of unapproved wireless equipment is an offence under Bahrain telecommunications law.
summary.zh: 只有在巴林TRA注册的授权进口商或分销商方可在巴林进口和销售经型号认证的无线及电信终端设备。巴林TRA审批标志及审批号须清晰显示于设备标签及产品包装上。海外制造商须在巴林当地委任一名进口商或TRA注册代理商，作为型号认证申请及持续合规义务的责任方。巴林通过法赫德国王大桥是进入沙特阿拉伯的重要物流和分销枢纽；但转运至沙特阿拉伯的货物须另行取得CITC/SDAIA型号认证方可在沙特境内销售，巴林TRA批准不赋予沙特市场准入权。未经授权进口或销售未经认证的无线设备属违反巴林电信法律的违规行为。
summary.zht: 只有在巴林TRA註冊的授權進口商或分銷商方可在巴林進口和銷售經型號認證的無線及電信終端設備。巴林TRA審批標誌及審批號須清晰顯示於設備標籤及產品包裝上。海外製造商須在巴林當地委任一名進口商或TRA註冊代理商，作為型號認證申請及持續合規義務的責任方。巴林通過法赫德國王大橋是進入沙烏地阿拉伯的重要物流和分銷樞紐；但轉運至沙烏地阿拉伯的貨物須另行取得CITC/SDAIA型號認證方可在沙特境內銷售，巴林TRA批准不賦予沙特市場准入權。未經授權進口或銷售未經認證的無線設備屬違反巴林電信法律的違規行為。

standards_or_laws: Bahrain Legislative Decree No. 48 of 2002 on Telecommunications (import/sale provisions)
TRA Bahrain Type Approval Conditions — Authorized Importer and Agent Requirements
TRA Bahrain Label and Marking Requirements (TRA approval mark and number on label)
GCC MRA — Mutual Recognition among GCC member states (Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman) — does not grant Saudi CITC approval from Bahrain TRA approval

summary.en: In China, the MIIT Network Access License (NAL) must be held by the manufacturer or its authorized representative. The CCC certificate holder (manufacturer or appointed agent) is responsible for placing the CCC mark on in-scope products. Distributors and importers do not require a separate licence, but must source from CCC-certified channels. Products sold in China bonded zones or pilot free trade zones for re-export are exempt from CCC, but any transition to domestic retail triggers full CCC obligations.
summary.zh: 在中国，工信部网络接入许可（NAL）须由制造商或其授权代表持有。CCC证书持有人（制造商或指定代理人）负责在列入目录的产品上标注CCC标志。经销商和进口商无需单独取得许可证，但须从CCC认证渠道采购。在中国保税区或试点自由贸易区内为转口目的销售的产品可豁免CCC，但转入国内零售则须履行完整的CCC义务。
summary.zht: 在中國，工信部網路接入許可（NAL）須由製造商或其授權代表持有。CCC證書持有人（製造商或指定代理人）負責在列入目錄的產品上標注CCC標誌。經銷商和進口商無需單獨取得許可證，但須從CCC認證渠道採購。在中國保稅區或試點自由貿易區內為轉口目的銷售的產品可豁免CCC，但轉入國內零售則須履行完整的CCC義務。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Administration of Telecom Equipment Access
CCC Authorized Applicant and Certificate Holder Rules (CNCA)
China Pilot Free Trade Zone CCC Exemption Rules (for re-export only)

gap.en: Bahrain requires a locally TRA-registered authorized importer or agent — this is a Bahrain-specific obligation with no direct CCC/NAL equivalent. The TRA Bahrain approval mark and number must appear on the physical label; a label change or re-stickering programme is typically needed for China-market products that carry SRRC/CCC numbers. Importantly, TRA Bahrain type approval does not grant automatic access to the Saudi Arabian market via the King Fahd Causeway land route; a separate CITC Saudi type approval is required for Saudi domestic sale even if products enter via Bahrain.
gap.zh: 巴林要求在TRA本地注册的授权进口商或代理商，这是巴林特有义务，无对应的CCC/NAL等效要求。巴林TRA审批标志和编号须显示于实体标签上；中国市场产品通常标注SRRC/CCC编号，一般需要更换或重贴标签。值得注意的是，巴林TRA型号认证不自动赋予通过法赫德国王大桥陆路进入沙特阿拉伯市场的权利；即使产品经巴林进入，在沙特境内销售仍须取得独立的CITC沙特型号认证。
gap.zht: 巴林要求在TRA本地註冊的授權進口商或代理商，這是巴林特有義務，無對應的CCC/NAL等效要求。巴林TRA審批標誌和編號須顯示於實體標籤上；中國市場產品通常標注SRRC/CCC編號，一般需要更換或重貼標籤。值得注意的是，巴林TRA型號認證不自動賦予通過法赫德國王大橋陸路進入沙烏地阿拉伯市場的權利；即使產品經巴林進入，在沙特境內銷售仍須取得獨立的CITC沙特型號認證。

source.publisher: TRA — Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Bahrain (هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A TRA Bahrain-registered authorized importer or agent is mandatory for all wireless equipment sold in Bahrain. TRA Bahrain approval mark and number must appear on device label and packaging. TRA Bahrain approval does not grant Saudi Arabia market access — a separate CITC/SDAIA type approval is required for Saudi domestic sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在巴林销售的所有无线设备须有巴林TRA注册授权进口商或代理商。巴林TRA审批标志和编号须显示于设备标签及包装上。巴林TRA批准不赋予沙特阿拉伯市场准入资格，在沙特境内销售须另行取得CITC/SDAIA型号认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在巴林銷售的所有無線設備須有巴林TRA註冊授權進口商或代理商。巴林TRA審批標誌和編號須顯示於設備標籤及包裝上。巴林TRA批准不賦予沙烏地阿拉伯市場准入資格，在沙特境內銷售須另行取得CITC/SDAIA型號認證。
